reason: Project spec index and package/layer routing for this implementation task.
Defines TianChen-RV boundaries and forbids modeling offload as high-level compute IR or custom ISA.
Defines explicit capability metadata and capability-driven availability semantics.
Defines the compute-free exec dialect boundary and diagnostic role.
Defines extension plugin interfaces and built-in registry behavior.
Defines proposal, legality, preference, and selection ordering.
Defines lowering boundary, runtime ABI metadata, emission readiness, and manifest contracts.
Defines generic runtime-offload plugin requirements and exclusions.
Provides contrast with RVV plugin and prevents offload from using RVV facts.
Defines lit/FileCheck and organized test expectations.
